characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair tied in a half-up ponytail and wears large, dark-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: A light green, textured, long-sleeved sweater.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant but engaged, eating a salad while talking.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a young female with long, wavy red hair and fair skin.
characters.wardrobe: A white t-shirt with a red graphic.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Can you speak English?
Character A says: Uh, थोड़ा बहुत। [Uh, a little bit.]
Character B says: Okay, what English words do you know?
Character A says: Hello?
Character B says: Nice! What else?
Character A says: Thank you.
Character B says: Good. And what do you say when you make a mistake?
Character A says: I... मैं... sorry? [I... I... sorry?]
Character B says: Almost! Repeat after me: "I apologize."
Character A says: I apologize.
Character B says: Your level is beginner.
Character A says: मुझे English बोलनी नहीं आती... मैं बस movies देखती हूँ subtitles के साथ। [I don't really know how to speak English... I just watch movies with subtitles.]
Character B says: That's enough to start! You can practice with AI tutors like me.
Character A says: Like you?
Character B says: Yes! Supernova has AI English tutors who correct you and talk to you naturally. You'll start speaking English much faster.
Character A says: But... with an AI?
Character B says: You won't lose anything by trying, and it will be worth it.
Character A says: Okay... teach me English.
Character B says: I will, but you better not give orders to your new tutor.
Character A says: I apologize!
Character B says: Go download Supernova right now.
Character A says: Okay, let's go!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core interaction: a learner casually talking to an AI tutor.
- Demonstrates the AI's ability to assess level and correct mistakes gently.
- Overcomes the learner's hesitation about practicing with AI.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.

- Provides clear app store badges for download.
